test_outputs.intent_text: Find the neighbor of interface 0-eth2 and configure a static route on router 0 to 172.16.9.0/24 via that neighbor's IP.

Configure router 5 to reach 172.16.7.0/24 using next-hop 10.0.5.1.
On router 2, install a default route via router 5.
Remove the static route on router 7 to prefix 172.16.0.0/24 using the IP of the neighbor connected to interface 7-eth0 as the next-hop.
